mapper.select:
select u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.id_number, u.phone, fi.id as flight_id, fi.flight_number, fi.departure, fi.destination, ms.id as order_id, ms.number as order_number, ms.status as order_status, ms.create_time as order_time, ms.meal_order as mealOrder, d.id as dish_id, ifnull(d.name, '未记录') as dish_name, ifnull(d.flavor_tags, '-') as dish_flavor, 1 as dish_count from meal_selection ms inner join user u on u.id = ms.user_id left join flight_info fi on fi.id = ms.flight_id left join recommendation_log rl on rl.user_id = ms.user_id and rl.flight_id = ms.flight_id and rl.user_feedback like 'MANUAL_SELECTED%' and rl.id = ( select max(rl2.id) from recommendation_log rl2 where rl2.user_id = ms.user_id and rl2.flight_id = ms.flight_id and rl2.user_feedback like 'MANUAL_SELECTED%' ) left join dish d on d.id = cast( regexp_replace( regexp_replace(rl.user_feedback, '.*dishId=', ''), ':.*', '' ) as unsigned )
and fi.flight_number like concat('%', #{flightNumber}, '%')
and u.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and u.id_number like concat('%', #{idNumber}, '%')
order by ms.create_time desc, ms.id desc
